user.title: OBD Monitor
user.description:
Connect to the obdmonitor Flutter app running on this device.

Make sure the obdmonitor app is running and the ELM327 adapter is selected.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the obdmonitor app REST server (127.0.0.1:8766). Make sure the app is running.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one OBD Monitor instance is allowed.
